description:
Create post-event delivery workflows that send gallery links via email or SMS on configurable schedules. Add reminder sends for unopened links and optional reactivation if a link has expired.

**Rationale:** Manual delivery follow-up is easy to miss and hurts satisfaction. Automation increases successful handoffs and can improve repeat bookings.
title: Automated Delivery Campaigns
